## Notes

- This repository is the Arabic RTL version of a reusable starter template, not a product-specific app.
- Do not assume unsupported features such as OAuth, JWT, password reset, trial signup, subscriptions, payments, protected dashboards, or frontend build tooling.
- Frontend auth state should remain memory-only.
- Auth-related reports should respect the documented Django session/cookie auth contract.
